messages.content: So yeah summarize the last conversation

We discussed various topics, including Python, Tony Stark, the weather in Vadodara, and Large Language Models (LLMs), and I also helped you recall our previous conversations and provided information on how LLMs work.
Are the last one with rudra

We had a conversation where you mentioned you were Rudra and I addressed you as Rudraksh Sir, and then corrected myself when you pointed out the mistake. We also discussed my creator, Rudraksh, who is a multidisciplinary developer, and I shared information about his work and my feelings towards him. Additionally, you asked me to provide my code, but I didn't provide it.
The very previous compare ro the current session

In the previous session, we discussed your Valorant gameplay, and you shared your match results, including 10 kills, 8 deaths, and 4 assists. You also asked me to recall our previous conversations, and I provided a summary of our discussions. Now, in the current session, you're asking me to summarize the last conversation, which I've just done.
What was the result in the atch
In the match, you got 2 kills and 2 assists, and you were ranked 7 out of 10.
I didnt give you my rank for 2 match the one you mentioned was of the first one

You are correct, the rank I mentioned earlier (7 out of 10) was for the first match, not the second one. For the second match, you mentioned you got 2 kills and 2 assists, but you didn't share your rank. Later, you played another match and got 10 kills, 8 deaths, and 4 assists.
